tagline: Scoro is comprehensive but enterprise-weighted. AgencyFlo is built for growing agencies, not corporates.
intro: Scoro is a comprehensive business management platform with strong coverage of project management, quoting, invoicing, and reporting. It is well-suited to larger, more established agencies. For growing agencies that want speed, simplicity, and AI — AgencyFlo is a different proposition.
agencyFloDesc: AgencyFlo is built specifically for agencies — combining project management, resource planning, financial visibility, client management, and FloAI in a platform designed to scale with you.
competitorDesc: Scoro is a business management platform for professional services firms. It covers quoting, project management, time tracking, invoicing, and reporting in a single platform, with pricing to match.

pricing.agencyflo: Flat rate — no per-seat pricing. Early access pricing confirmed at launch.
pricing.competitor: Per-seat pricing from approximately $26–71/user/month. Significant cost for growing teams.

whoSuitsAgencyFlo: Growing agencies (5–50 people) that want agency-native operations with AI, without enterprise-level complexity or enterprise pricing.
whoSuitsCompetitor: Established agencies and professional services firms that need comprehensive business management including quoting, invoicing, and reporting — and have the budget and team to implement it properly.

faqs.question: Is Scoro too expensive for smaller agencies?
faqs.answer: Scoro's per-seat pricing makes it costly for growing agencies. A 15-person team could easily pay £400–700/month before advanced features. AgencyFlo is designed to be accessible to agencies at all growth stages.

faqs.question: Does Scoro have AI features?
faqs.answer: Scoro has some AI-assisted features, but FloAI in AgencyFlo is a fundamentally different layer — an AI assistant with full context across projects, clients, resources, and finances, capable of answering questions, flagging risks, and drafting content.
